strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js across multiple roles
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Strong background in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization for high-traffic systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with Vitest testing framework, relying more on Jest and Playwright
Primary stack alignment is strong but secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) appear less frequently used in recent roles
Recent tenure at current role is very short (since April 2025), raising questions about long-term commitment
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack capabilities with deep expertise in the primary required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, React) and relevant secondary technologies. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure aligns well with the emerging AI requirements. However, his brief tenure in his current role and limited recent exposure to Kotlin/Java raise some concerns about long-term fit and secondary skill currency.
